# Quality Management Plan

## Purpose
Define quality objectives, standards, assurance, and control activities for the project.

## Audience
Quality Manager, Project Manager, QA Lead, Delivery Teams, Compliance.

## Inputs
- QA checklist (`docs/templates/quality/qa-checklist-waterfall.xlsx`).
- Requirements and acceptance criteria.

## 1. Quality Objectives
List measurable quality goals (defect rates, test coverage, customer satisfaction).

## 2. Standards & Regulations
Document applicable standards (ISO, IEEE, regulatory requirements) and internal policies.

## 3. Roles & Responsibilities
| Role | Responsibilities | Approval Authority |
| --- | --- | --- |
|  |  |  |

## 4. Quality Assurance Processes
Describe audits, reviews, and governance checkpoints.

## 5. Quality Control Processes
Define testing types, inspections, and defect tracking.

## 6. Test Strategy
Outline test levels, environments, data needs, and tooling.

## 7. Defect Management Process
Describe classification, triage, escalation, and closure criteria.

## 8. Metrics & KPIs
| Metric | Definition | Target | Reporting Cadence |
| --- | --- | --- | --- |
|  |  |  |  |

## 9. Continuous Improvement
Describe how lessons learned and retrospectives will update quality practices.

## Completion Checklist
- [ ] Quality objectives and standards documented.
- [ ] QA/QC processes defined with owners.
- [ ] Metrics and reporting cadence established.

## Acceptance Criteria
- Quality plan aligns with governance and compliance requirements.
- QA checklist and test strategy are traceable to quality objectives.
